quick_skim.title: Bayesian control for coding agents
quick_skim.abstract: Modern coding agents pair LLM generators with various tools, including cheap diagnostics and expensive verifiers. The tool-use decisions are typically governed by orchestrators that often use fixed rules and ignore uncertainty. We formulate orchestration as cost-sensitive sequential hypothesis testing: a Bayesian controller maintains a belief over candidate correctness and dynamically decides whether to gather more evidence, refine the candidate, verify it, or stop. Across six generators and nine coding benchmarks, Bayesian control proves to be most valuable when verification is costly and critics are informative but imperfect. Beyond control, the belief state yields an interpretable correctness score that outperforms token-probability and raw tool-success baselines for uncertainty quantification.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: Bayesian controller for coding agents provides uncertainty quantification via belief state
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 编码智能体的贝叶斯控制器通过信念状态提供不确定性量化
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 编码智能体的贝叶斯控制器通过信念状态提供不确定性量化
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 编码智能体的贝叶斯控制器通过信念状态提供不确定性量化
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Formulates orchestration of coding agents as sequential hypothesis testing with Bayesian control, using belief state for uncertainty quantification that outperforms baselines.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 该论文针对编码智能体中工具使用决策忽略不确定性的问题，提出贝叶斯控制器，将编排视为成本敏感的序列假设检验。控制器维护候选正确性的信念，动态决定下一步行动。在多个生成器和基准上，贝叶斯控制比固定规则更优，且信念状态提供的不确定性分数超越传统基线。该不确定性量化方法可迁移至LLM安全领域。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 该论文针对编码智能体中工具使用决策忽略不确定性的问题，提出贝叶斯控制器，将编排视为成本敏感的序列假设检验。控制器维护候选正确性的信念，动态决定下一步行动。在多个生成器和基准上，贝叶斯控制比固定规则更优，且信念状态提供的不确定性分数超越传统基线。该不确定性量化方法可迁移至LLM安全领域。

quick_skim.title: Efficient Analytic Uncertainty Quantification for Multi-Modal Regression
quick_skim.abstract: Efficient uncertainty quantification (UQ) is essential for trustworthy large-scale learning. Existing UQ methods for regression tasks mainly operate under the assumption that the conditional label marginal satisfies single-peak parametric models, e.g., Gaussians, where the negative log-likelihood function simplifies to the mean square error. However, such single-peak assumptions fail in regression tasks featuring multi-modal distributions. On the other hand, semi-parametric methods which achieve strong regression performance for multi-modal distributions often lack efficient quantification on their prediction variances. In this work, we extend UQ techniques based on Variational Bayesian Inference (VBI) to two widely used semi-parametric regression models that yield histogram-like reconstructions of the conditional label densities: Quantile Regression (QR) and Classification Restoration (CR). Our approach introduces a unified, distribution-agnostic framework that simultaneously achieves accurate estimation of complex conditional distributions and highly efficient UQ. Theoretically, our method is grounded in novel formulations of QR and CR within the VBI framework, yielding analytic Evidence Lower Bounds (ELBO) to streamline training and a closed-form or analytically approximated predictive density for efficient inference. Empirically, we evaluate our methods on three large-scale regression benchmarks with multi-modal label distributions. Our framework outperforms state-of-the-art multi-modal regression baselines, and even matches predictive performance of computationally expensive ensemble models. Furthermore, by leveraging epistemic uncertainty estimation, our approach enables highly data-efficient active learning strategies.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 多模态回归的不确定性量化方法
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 多模态回归的不确定性量化方法
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 多模态回归的不确定性量化方法
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Proposes a variational Bayesian inference method for efficient uncertainty quantification in multi-modal regression, extending UQ to semi-parametric models.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 针对多模态回归任务中传统单峰假设失效的问题，提出基于变分贝叶斯推理的高效不确定性量化方法，将其扩展到半参数回归模型，在多个数据集上验证了效率和准确性。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 针对多模态回归任务中传统单峰假设失效的问题，提出基于变分贝叶斯推理的高效不确定性量化方法，将其扩展到半参数回归模型，在多个数据集上验证了效率和准确性。
